steps.title: Use Sara's storytelling
steps.content: Sara is telling stories and begins to "invent" wonderful things while performing them with expression. In this context, the word means making up or composing story material.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: A suggests deception. B suggests concealment. D means finding something that already exists. The remaining word means to bring something into being, which fits Sara's storytelling. The answer is C.
